top_signals: IRAN fires cluster warhead missiles (Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr) at Tel Aviv — revenge for Larijani assassination
2 killed in Ramat Gan from cluster munition strike — first use of cluster warheads against Israeli cities
Iran army chief vows 'decisive and regrettable' retaliation — escalation cycle continues
NCTC Director Kent resigns: 'Iran posed no imminent threat' — cites Israeli misinformation to Trump
Kabul drug rehab centre struck — 100+ killed (BBC confirmed), separate from 400-death hospital strike
Israel strikes Beirut kill 6 — Lebanon ground invasion deepening, 1M+ displaced
Oil Brent ~$102/barrel (+3%), up 40% since war began — IEA to release emergency reserves
Trump delays China visit 'because we've got a war' — US-China diplomacy frozen
Gabbard backs Trump despite Kent resignation — Senate Intelligence testimony Wednesday
EU/Germany refuse Hormuz coalition — Trump reverses: 'US never needed NATO'

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 21): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Iran escalates to cluster warheads. Israel expands Lebanon ops. Pakistan kills 100+ in Kabul. Senate hearing today may shift narrative but not battlefield reality. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Senate Intel Committee hearing TODAY — Gabbard, CIA, FBI to testify on Iran war
latest_news.text: Top Trump intel officials face Congress: Gabbard, CIA Dir. Kash Patel, FBI Dir. to testify on Iran war justification. Follows Kent resignation citing 'Israeli misinformation.' Senate Intel hearing expected to be explosive — potential inflection point on war narrative.

latest_news.headline: Iran cluster warhead missiles hit Tel Aviv — 2 killed Ramat Gan, revenge for Larijani
latest_news.source: Reuters / BBC / NYT / Times of Israel
latest_news.text: IRGC launches Khorramshahr-4 and Qadr missiles with cluster warheads at Tel Aviv area. 2 killed in Ramat Gan. Iran state TV: 'revenge for martyrdom of Ali Larijani.' Army chief Hatami vows 'decisive and regrettable' further retaliation.

latest_news.headline: Kabul drug rehab centre airstrike — 100+ killed (BBC confirmed)
latest_news.text: BBC confirms 100+ killed in Pakistani airstrike on drug treatment centre in Kabul. Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.' EU urges restraint.

latest_news.headline: NCTC Director Kent resigns: 'Iran posed no imminent threat' — cites Israeli misinformation
latest_news.text: Joe Kent resigns NCTC citing Israeli 'misinformation' to Trump. Says Iran posed no imminent threat. Gabbard backs Trump anyway. Senate Intel testimony Wednesday.

latest_news.headline: Oil Brent $102 (+3%), up 40% since war — IEA to release emergency reserves
latest_news.text: Brent crude at $102.36/barrel, up 40% since war began Feb 28. IEA announces emergency reserves. US diesel $5/gallon.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 05:04 UTC) — War Day 19. Senate Intelligence Committee hearing TODAY (Mar 18): Gabbard, CIA Dir. Patel, FBI Dir. testify on Iran war justification — fallout from Kent resignation. Iran cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv (2 killed Ramat Gan). Army chief vows escalation. Kabul drug rehab airstrike kills 100+. Israel kills 6 in Beirut. Oil $102 (+40% since war). IEA releasing emergency reserves. NO ceasefire signals in any theater. Senate hearing is today's inflection point.
